name: sofa-buffers-corelib-c-cpp
description: Dependency-free, heap-free, streaming C99/C++20 implementation of the SofaBuffers (Sofab) serialization format. Packs structured fields into a caller-owned buffer and decodes them through a callback-driven decoder, with no allocator and no third-party dependencies.

no-object-api.description: Exclude the optional object-descriptor API (object.c) to shrink the library to the bare stream corelib.
